article_title: ASP.NET Core Web API 完全指南：请求管道、认证、错误处理到生产部署
core_theme: .NET 10 中 ASP.NET Core Web API 全貌：请求管道、路由、JWT 认证授权、ProblemDetails 错误处理、集成测试和生产部署
reader_takeaway: 掌握构建生产级 ASP.NET Core Web API 的核心概念，能搭起带 JWT 认证、ProblemDetails 错误处理和集成测试的完整服务
summary_angle: ASP.NET Core 把 HTTP 的繁琐细节都处理好了，让你专注写业务逻辑，而理解顺序和管道是避开静默 bug 的关键

information_blocks.source_anchor: 每个中间件包裹下一个，UseAuthentication 必须先于 UseAuthorization，顺序错误安全策略会静默失效
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中间件链条从左到右流动，关键节点高亮发光

information_blocks.source_anchor: JWT bearer tokens 是现代 Web API 的标准认证方案，policy-based authorization 比散布 Roles 特性更可维护
information_blocks.visual_idea: 令牌验证节点，策略门控

information_blocks.source_anchor: RFC 9457 ProblemDetails 标准 + IExceptionHandler 让所有未处理异常产生一致的 JSON 错误响应
information_blocks.visual_idea: 异常统一汇聚到一个处理枢纽

information_blocks.source_anchor: WebApplicationFactory<TProgram> 在内存中启动完整应用，发真实 HTTP 请求，能发现路由、中间件顺序等集成问题
information_blocks.visual_idea: 测试框架包裹整个运行中的应用

main_metaphor: HTTP 服务的分层流水线
primary_subject: 发光的请求数据流穿越四个功能节点
subject_action: 请求从左侧流入，依次通过请求管道、认证、错误处理，到达测试验收节点
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: game concept art illustration, clear hero object, readable environment storytelling, polished cinematic lighting, production-art detail
selected_style_reason: 随机从40项风格池中选定；游戏原画风的清晰主体、分层环境叙事和生产级画质，适合呈现完整技术指南的管道结构
style_safety_note: 游戏原画风不指向特定品牌、工作室或艺术家，无需安全改写
draft_goal: 验证请求流动隐喻和四个信息块的布局是否清晰、主焦点是否突出
final_prompt: Wide cover illustration, aspect ratio 2.35:1. Game concept art illustration style with editorial technical illustration base: clear hero object, readable environment storytelling, polished cinematic lighting, production-art detail. The scene shows a glowing data stream flowing diagonally from left to right through four illuminated tech nodes in a deep oceanic blue environment (#0a1628). The stream is a luminous cyan-teal ribbon. Four callout zones with short Chinese labels: '请求管道' at the entry node (glowing amber), 'JWT认证' at the auth checkpoint (teal shield), '统一错误' at the central hub (orange ring), '集成测试' at the exit node wrapped in a test harness frame. Dramatic cinematic rim lighting, cool teal ambient glow, warm amber accents on active nodes. No fake UI, no dashboard, no code text, no chart axes, no English text. Wide horizontal composition with diagonal flow, single bright focal point at the central hub.
